line_1: Not that which on the surging aether floats,
line_2: Or trembles in the linnet's gurgling notes; —

line_1: Thus spoke the nymph, — to heav'n the music floats,
line_2: And angels echo back the tuneful notes.

line_1: As downward on the ev'ning gale it floats.
line_2: Whose close my voice prolongs in dying notes,

line_1: As down th' etherial music floats,
line_2: And hark! — ah, what celestial notes,
